creator: sean.smith@basecommerce.com
text:
When I enter the Poudriere jail manually and look for dom.so, it is located in /usr/local/lib/php/20131226-zts/dom.so 

The /usr/local/lib/php/ directory only contains these two dirs:
20131226-zts    build

The error message looks like it is looking for 20131226 and not 20131226-zts

===>   php56-xmlreader-5.6.30 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/php/20131226/dom.so - not found
*** Error code 1
